statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); ctx=""; [ -n "$used" ] && ctx="Context: ${used}% used"; [ -n "$remaining" ] && ctx="$ctx (${remaining}% remaining)"; echo "$cwd | $model | $ctx" | sed 's/ | $//'
